message:
fix(multi-agent): reviewed agent changes + audit batch 531

Reviewed and staged multi-agent changes (all audited SOUND):
- mpsc: FIFO ordering guard for send_evict_oldest with queued waiters
- postgres: replaced todo!() with proper error in doc example
- certificate: overflow-safe compact() via u32 try_from
- extractor: comparison_key tie-breaking, cyclic e-class guard
- handshake: header_has_token fixes substring false positive
- uring: cursor_lock serialization, current_fd_position via lseek
- session_types: Send+static bounds split, import fixes
- buffer: push_waker_if_new dedup helper
- resource: minor cleanup
- web/mod+websocket: adjustments

audit_index.jsonl: 9 entries (batch 531), 8 SOUND + 1 FIXED

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
